art_market.summary: Cautious optimism and strategic recalibration in Q1 2026. Global sales grew 4% in 2025.
key_trends: Digital art integration (51% of high-net-worth buyers active)
Shift from speculative NFTs to 'phygital' assets
Collectors prioritizing experiences and emotionally resonant art

korean_market.summary: KOSPI closed higher on March 20, 2026. Markets displayed significant volatility throughout the day, influenced by Middle East geopolitical tensions and central bank expectations, but showed resilience toward the close.
korean_market.sentiment: Cautious but resilient; market participants are monitoring geopolitical developments closely.
